spec.precondition: requires valid(galloc) && valid(node) && buffer_id >= 0 && buffer_id < galloc->n_buffers && valid(galloc->hash_set) && valid(galloc->hash_values) && valid_range(galloc->bufts, 0, galloc->n_buffers) && valid_range(galloc->buf_tallocs, 0, galloc->n_buffers) && galloc->buf_tallocs[buffer_id] != NULL && galloc->bufts[buffer_id] != NULL && valid(node->src) && (forall i in 0..GGML_MAX_SRC: node->src[i] == NULL || valid(node->src[i])) && (node->view_src == NULL || valid(node->view_src))
spec.postcondition: ensures (ggml_gallocr_is_allocated(galloc, node) || ggml_impl_is_view(node) || ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, node)->allocated == true) && (ggml_gallocr_is_allocated(galloc, node) || ggml_impl_is_view(node) || ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, node)->buffer_id == buffer_id || ggml_gallocr_hash_get(galloc, node)->buffer_id >= 0) && galloc state is updated to track node allocation in buffer_id or reused parent buffer
